reasoning: The question asks if the price of US diesel will increase by the resolution dates compared to 2025-10-26. No specific dates are listed, but the question close date is 2026-01-24, representing about a 3-month forecast horizon. Diesel prices typically experience a slight seasonal decrease from late October (harvest and heating oil stocking season) to late January. Furthermore, commodity price changes over a 3-month horizon largely resemble a random walk with high volatility, giving an outcome close to 50/50. Factoring in the provided empirical base rate of 0.422 for FRED questions, the probability of an increase over this short term is estimated to be slightly below 50%. Therefore, I estimate a probability of 0.45.
